positive: A sophisticated, minimalist depiction of a celestial forest canopy, viewed from below looking up through intertwined branches and cosmic rays. The primary subject is a stylized, geometric grouping of luminous flora and fauna elements, including crescent moons, stylized constellations, and ethereal jellyfish silhouettes drifting among fractal leaves. The composition is symmetrical and centered, emphasizing negative space and high contrast. Style: Modern celestial art, combining geometric vector lines with soft, gradient luminosity. Color direction: Deep indigo, sapphire blue, shimmering gold, and subtle pearl white accents. Lighting: Backlit, creating strong, clean silhouettes against a dark gradient sky. Print-friendly details: Isolated elements designed for seamless tiling or central placement on fabric.
